query:
UPDATE island_guides 
SET beachesLocalRules = JSON_OBJECT(
  'beaches', JSON_ARRAY(
    JSON_OBJECT(
      'name', 'Main Tourist Beach',
      'description', 'The primary beach area for visitors with clear turquoise waters and white sand',
      'facilities', 'Changing rooms, showers, sun loungers available'
    ),
    JSON_OBJECT(
      'name', 'Local Beach',
      'description', 'Traditional beach area used by local residents',
      'facilities', 'Basic facilities, more authentic experience'
    )
  ),
  'localRules', JSON_OBJECT(
    'dressCode', 'Dress modestly in public areas. Swimwear is acceptable on beaches and at resorts, but cover up when visiting local islands or shops',
    'photography', 'Always ask permission before photographing local people. Photography is restricted during prayer times',
    'alcohol', 'Alcohol is not permitted on local islands. Only available at resort islands',
    'prayerTimes', 'Respect prayer times (5 daily prayers). Shops may close during prayer times. Avoid loud music and activities',
    'culturalSensitivity', 'The Maldives is a Muslim country. Be respectful of local customs and traditions',
    'beachBehavior', 'Do not remove coral, shells, or marine life. Reef-safe sunscreen is recommended',
    'photography', 'Sunset photography is popular but be respectful of prayer times'
  )
)
WHERE beachesLocalRules IS NULL OR beachesLocalRules = ''
